statement: CoreWeave FY revenue grew about 168% year-over-year from $1.9 billion to $5.1 billion, while net loss widened from $937 million to $1.2 billion.
why: Rapid neocloud revenue growth reflects strong GPU-compute demand, though the widening loss underscores the capital intensity of the buildout.

impact.mechanism: CoreWeave's revenue is a proxy for rented GPU-compute demand; growth signals strong demand while losses signal buildout cost.

evidence.excerpt: Last year, while the company reported $5.1 billion in revenue, more than doubling the $1.9 billion it posted in the previous year...

confidence.basis: Single secondary source (Motley Fool); no primary filing.
